resources.name: Kentucky Department of Corrections — Division of Reentry Services
resources.description: The Kentucky Department of Corrections Division of Reentry Services coordinates statewide reentry planning for people in state custody or under community supervision. The division oversees 13 Reentry Service Centers across Kentucky and assigns regional reentry coordinators who work with individuals and families before and after release. They help build individualized reentry plans and connect people to housing, employment, benefits, and community partners. This is a planning and referral office—not a crisis or emergency line.
resources.description_es: La División de Servicios de Reinserción del Departamento de Correcciones de Kentucky coordina la planificación estatal para personas en custodia estatal o bajo supervisión comunitaria. Supervisa 13 Centros de Servicios de Reinserción en todo el estado y asigna coordinadores regionales que trabajan con personas y familias antes y después de la liberación. Ayudan a crear planes personalizados y conectar con vivienda, empleo, beneficios y aliados comunitarios. Es una oficina de planificación y referencias—no una línea de crisis.
resources.eligibility: Varies by program—generally serves Kentucky residents under DOC custody, supervision, or seeking state reentry services.
resources.eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—generalmente sirve a residentes de Kentucky bajo custodia DOC, supervisión o que buscan servicios estatales de reintegración.
resources.notes: For your area, contact the regional Reentry Coordinator listed at corrections.ky.gov/Reentry.
resources.notes_es: Personas bajo custodia o supervisión del DOC de Kentucky y sus familias. Para preguntas generales, llame al (502) 782-2347. Para su región, contacte al coordinador de reinserción en corrections.ky.gov/Reentry.

resources.name: CTS-Russell (Community Transitional Services)
resources.description: Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center for men in community custody, operated by Community Transitional Services (CTS). Provides licensed transitional housing plus structured programming: Moral Reconation Therapy (MRT), employment preparation, substance use education, and case management aligned with parole and probation requirements. Admissions require a referral from Kentucky DOC Probation and Parole—call to confirm current bed availability.
resources.description_es: Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC de Kentucky para hombres bajo custodia comunitaria, operado por Community Transitional Services (CTS). Ofrece vivienda transitoria con licencia y programación estructurada: Terapia de Reconación Moral (MRT), preparación laboral, educación sobre sustancias y manejo de casos alineado con libertad condicional. Las admisiones requieren referido de Probation and Parole del DOC—llame para confirmar disponibilidad.
resources.hours: Visitation Saturday–Sunday, 12:00–3:00 p.m.; call for office hours
resources.eligibility: Provides licensed transitional housing plus structured programming: Moral Reconation Therapy (MRT), employment preparation, substance use education, and case management aligned with parole and probation requirements. Admissions require a referral from Kentucky DOC Probation and Parole—call to confirm current bed availability.
resources.eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—muchos aceptan personas con antecedentes penales. La mayoría de vivienda transitoria requiere referido o solicitud; llame para confirmar disponibilidad.
resources.notes: Male DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center offering transitional housing, employment preparation, MRT, and reentry programming.
resources.notes_es: Centro de Reinserción contratado por el DOC para hombres con vivienda transitoria, preparación laboral, MRT y programación de reinserción.

resources.name: Kentucky Career Center — Lexington (Bluegrass)
resources.description: Kentucky Career Center – Bluegrass is the American Job Center serving 17 Central Kentucky counties including Fayette, Madison, Jessamine, and Woodford. Free services include job search assistance, resume workshops, career assessment, veterans' services, youth programs, and referrals to training and credentialing. Staff help justice-involved job seekers connect to employment opportunities and barrier-removal resources.
resources.description_es: Kentucky Career Center – Bluegrass es el Centro de Trabajo Americano que sirve 17 condados del centro de Kentucky incluyendo Fayette, Madison, Jessamine y Woodford. Servicios gratuitos: búsqueda de empleo, talleres de currículum, evaluación profesional, servicios para veteranos, programas juveniles y referencias a capacitación. Ayudan a personas con antecedentes de justicia a conectar con empleo.
resources.eligibility: Open to all job seekers, including those recently released from incarceration. Core career services are free.
resources.eligibility_es: Abierto a todos los buscadores de empleo, incluidos recién liberados. Los servicios básicos de carrera son gratuitos.
resources.notes: Serves Anderson, Bourbon, Boyle, Clark, Estill, Fayette, Franklin, Garrard, Harrison, Jessamine, Lincoln, Madison, Mercer, Nicholas, Powell, Scott, and Woodford counties.
resources.notes_es: Sirve los condados Anderson, Bourbon, Boyle, Clark, Estill, Fayette, Franklin, Garrard, Harrison, Jessamine, Lincoln, Madison, Mercer, Nicholas, Powell, Scott y Woodford.

resources.name: kynect — Medicaid & Benefits Enrollment
resources.description: kynect is Kentucky's official online portal to apply for Medicaid (including the Kentucky HEALTH plan), SNAP food benefits, KTAP cash assistance, childcare subsidies, and other public benefits. People leaving incarceration can enroll in Medicaid immediately upon release—and under Kentucky's federal 1115 Reentry waiver, eligible individuals may receive up to one year of Medicaid coverage plus pre-release screening starting 60 days before release. Apply online, call the helpline, or visit any DCBS office.
resources.description_es: kynect es el portal oficial de Kentucky para solicitar Medicaid (incluido Kentucky HEALTH), beneficios SNAP, asistencia KTAP, subsidios de cuidado infantil y otros beneficios públicos. Las personas que salen del encarcelamiento pueden inscribirse en Medicaid inmediatamente—y bajo la exención federal 1115 de Reinserción, personas elegibles pueden recibir hasta un año de cobertura Medicaid más evaluación previa a la liberación desde 60 días antes. Solicite en línea, por teléfono o en cualquier oficina del DCBS.
resources.hours: Online 24/7; phone support Monday–Friday during business hours
resources.eligibility: Open to Kentucky residents in the service area. Medicaid, Medicare, and most insurance accepted; crisis services available regardless of ability to pay.
resources.eligibility_es: Abierto a residentes de Kentucky en el área de servicio. Se acepta Medicaid, Medicare y la mayoría de seguros; servicios de crisis disponibles sin importar capacidad de pago.
resources.notes: Medicaid reentry waiver: pre-release screening up to 60 days before release For local DCBS office, visit kynect.ky.gov or call 1-855-306-8959.
resources.notes_es: Exención Medicaid de reinserción: evaluación previa hasta 60 días antes de la liberación suministro de un mes de medicamentos al salir para elegibles. Para oficina DCBS local, visite kynect.ky.gov o llame al 1-855-306-8959.

resources.name: Stepworks Recovery Centers
resources.description: Stepworks Recovery Centers operates six Kentucky locations offering medical detox, residential (ASAM 3.5/3.7), and outpatient substance use treatment. Facilities in Elizabethtown, Bowling Green, Nicholasville, London, and Paducah. Medical detox for opioids, alcohol, and benzodiazepines; accepts most insurance including Medicaid. Single statewide access line for referrals and admissions.
resources.description_es: Stepworks Recovery Centers opera seis ubicaciones en Kentucky con desintoxicación médica, tratamiento residencial (ASAM 3.5/3.7) y ambulatorio para uso de sustancias. Instalaciones en Elizabethtown, Bowling Green, Nicholasville, London y Paducah. Desintoxicación médica para opioides, alcohol y benzodiacepinas; acepta la mayoría de seguros incluido Medicaid.
resources.eligibility: Adults seeking substance use treatment. Medicaid and private insurance accepted at many locations; call for intake and admission criteria.
resources.eligibility_es: Adultos que buscan tratamiento de sustancias. Se acepta Medicaid y seguro privado en muchas ubicaciones; llame para criterios de admisión.
resources.notes: Statewide access center: (800) 545-9031. London location is men-only residential. Pregnant women accepted with OB approval. See stepworks.com/insurance for accepted plans.
resources.notes_es: Centro de acceso estatal: (800) 545-9031. Ubicación de London es residencial solo para hombres. Mujeres embarazadas aceptadas con aprobación obstétrica.

resources.name: Kentucky Legal Aid — Bowling Green
resources.description: Kentucky Legal Aid serves low-income residents in 35 western and south-central Kentucky counties including Warren, Daviess, Christian, and Hopkins. Free civil legal help with housing, public benefits, family matters, and expungement when records create employment or housing barriers. Statewide intake line routes callers to the nearest office in Bowling Green, Owensboro, or Paducah.
resources.description_es: Kentucky Legal Aid sirve a residentes de bajos ingresos en 35 condados del oeste y centro-sur de Kentucky incluyendo Warren, Daviess, Christian y Hopkins. Ayuda legal civil gratuita con vivienda, beneficios públicos, asuntos familiares y eliminación de antecedentes. La línea de ingreso estatal dirige a la oficina más cercana en Bowling Green, Owensboro o Paducah.
resources.hours: Intake line Mon–Fri during business hours
resources.eligibility: Low-income Kentucky residents. Intake required to confirm income eligibility and whether your legal issue is covered.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de bajos ingresos. Se requiere admisión para confirmar elegibilidad de ingresos y si su caso legal está cubierto.
resources.notes_es: Ingreso estatal: (877) 782-4219. Oficina de Bowling Green en 1700 Destiny Lane. Colabora con clínicas de Goodwill en el oeste de Kentucky.

resources.name: Kentucky SNAP Enrollment — kynect
resources.description: Apply for SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program/food stamps) through Kentucky's kynect portal, by phone, or at any DCBS office in all 120 counties. Kentucky has lifted the lifetime ban on SNAP for people with drug-related felony convictions—you may remain eligible if you meet requirements under KRS 205.2005. Benefits loaded on EBT card. Also use kynect for Medicaid and other benefits in one application.
resources.description_es: Solicite SNAP (Programa de Asistencia Nutricional Suplementaria/tarjetas de alimentos) a través del portal kynect, por teléfono o en cualquier oficina del DCBS en los 120 condados. Kentucky eliminó la prohibición de por vida de SNAP para condenas por delitos de drogas—puede seguir siendo elegible bajo KRS 205.2005. Beneficios en tarjeta EBT.
resources.hours: Online 24/7; DCBS offices Mon–Fri business hours
resources.eligibility: Kentucky has lifted the lifetime ban on SNAP for people with drug-related felony convictions—you may remain eligible if you meet requirements under KRS 205.2005.
resources.eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—muchos sirven hogares de bajos ingresos; algunas despensas están abiertas a todos. Puede aplicar verificación de ingresos.
resources.notes: Apply at any county DCBS office or online. Same kynect portal as Medicaid and KTAP.
resources.notes_es: Solicite en cualquier oficina DCBS o en línea.

resources.name: Social Security Administration — Locate an Office
resources.description: Use SSA's national office locator to find the nearest Social Security field office anywhere in Kentucky. A Social Security number and card (or SSA verification letter) is required to obtain a Kentucky driver's license or state ID and for most employment. Call 1-800-772-1213 for automated services and appointment scheduling, or visit ssa.gov for online card replacement and benefit applications. As of 2025, in-person field office visits generally require an appointment.
resources.description_es: Use el localizador nacional de la SSA para encontrar la oficina más cercana en Kentucky. Se necesita número y tarjeta del Seguro Social (o carta de verificación) para licencia de conducir o identificación estatal y para la mayoría del empleo. Llame al 1-800-772-1213 para servicios automatizados y citas, o visite ssa.gov. Desde 2025, las visitas en persona generalmente requieren cita.
resources.hours: National phone line Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–7:00 p.m.; field office hours vary by location
resources.eligibility: Kentucky residents. Returning citizens with felony convictions may use a Felon Release Letter plus certified birth certificate for a standard ID—see program details.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación más acta de nacimiento certificada para ID estándar.
resources.notes: National toll-free: 1-800-772-1213 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). TTY: 1-800-325-0778. Online services at ssa.gov/myaccount for many card and benefit needs.
resources.notes_es: Línea nacional: 1-800-772-1213 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). TTY: 1-800-325-0778. Servicios en línea en ssa.gov/myaccount.

resources.name: LIHEAP — Utility Assistance (Community Action Kentucky)
resources.description: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) helps eligible Kentucky households pay heating, cooling, and crisis utility bills. Administered through local Community Action Agencies in all 120 counties via Community Action Kentucky (CAPKY). Three components: Subsidy (seasonal, typically November–December), Crisis (heating emergencies, January–March), and Summer Subsidy (cooling, July–September). Income at or below 150% of Federal Poverty Guidelines. Apply at your county's Community Action office—call 1-800-456-3452 or use capky.org/network to find your local agency.
resources.description_es: LIHEAP ayuda a hogares elegibles de Kentucky a pagar facturas de calefacción, refrigeración y crisis. Administrado por Agencias de Acción Comunitaria en 120 condados vía CAPKY. Tres componentes: Subsidio (noviembre–diciembre), Crisis (emergencias de calefacción, enero–marzo) y Subsidio de Verano (refrigeración, julio–septiembre). Ingresos hasta 150% de las Pautas Federales de Pobreza. Solicite en su oficina local—llame al 1-800-456-3452 o use capky.org/network.
resources.hours: Local agency hours vary; statewide info line during business hours
resources.eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
resources.eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
resources.notes: Call to find your local Community Action office
resources.notes_es: Componente Crisis requiere aviso de desconexión o combustible bajo. Traiga SSN de todos los miembros, comprobante de ingresos del mes anterior y facturas de servicios.

resources.name: TANK — Transit Authority of Northern Kentucky
resources.description: Transit Authority of Northern Kentucky (TANK) provides public bus service in Boone, Campbell, and Kenton counties with connections to downtown Cincinnati. Operates 27 routes, 19 park-and-ride locations, and the RAMP paratransit program for riders with disabilities, 365 days a year. Covington Transit Center on Madison Avenue is a major hub. Essential transportation for NKY residents without vehicles traveling to work, appointments, and Cincinnati-area destinations.
resources.description_es: TANK proporciona autobuses públicos en los condados Boone, Campbell y Kenton con conexiones al centro de Cincinnati. Opera 27 rutas, 19 park-and-ride y paratransit RAMP para personas con discapacidades, 365 días al año. Centro de Tránsito de Covington en Madison Avenue es un hub principal. Transporte esencial para residentes de NKY sin vehículo.
resources.hours: Route hours vary by line; administration Mon–Fri 7:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
resources.eligibility: Open to the public; reduced fares may require eligibility documentation (age, disability, or income).
resources.eligibility_es: Abierto al público; tarifas reducidas pueden requerir documentación de elegibilidad (edad, discapacidad o ingresos).
resources.notes: Lost & found and customer service: 859-331-TANK (8265), Mon–Fri 7 a.m.–6 p.m. Schedules and fare info at tankbus.org.
resources.notes_es: Objetos perdidos y servicio al cliente: 859-331-TANK, lun–vie 7 a.m.–6 p.m. Horarios en tankbus.org. Socio de Cincinnati SORTA para servicio transfronterizo.

resources.name: KCTCS — Adult Education & GED (Statewide)
resources.description: Kentucky Community and Technical College System (KCTCS) administers free adult education and GED preparation statewide through 13 college-based Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) providers in all 120 counties. Classes offered in communities, jails, and prisons. Kentucky pays for first GED test in each subject (plus limited retakes) for eligible test-takers who pass the free GED Ready practice test—use promo code KYFREEGED1. Over 4,460 GEDs awarded to incarcerated Kentuckians 2020–2024.
resources.description_es: KCTCS administra educación para adultos y preparación GED gratuita en 120 condados a través de 13 proveedores KYAE. Clases en comunidades, cárceles y prisiones. Kentucky paga la primera prueba GED en cada materia para elegibles que pasen GED Ready—código KYFREEGED1. Más de 4,460 GEDs otorgados a personas encarceladas 2020–2024.
resources.hours: Local center hours vary by KCTCS college—contact nearest provider
resources.eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
resources.notes: Contact your local KCTCS college to find the nearest program
resources.notes_es: Encuentre su centro en kyae.ky.gov. Edad mínima 19 sin exención. También ofrece ESL, certificaciones laborales y alfabetización familiar.

resources.name: National Call Center for Homeless Veterans
resources.description: National Call Center for Homeless Veterans (877-4AID-VET) is a free, confidential 24/7 hotline connecting veterans— including those leaving incarceration without housing—to the nearest VA homeless program, emergency shelter, and case management. Critical first contact for veterans with no place to stay after release. Trained counselors assess needs and link to HUD-VASH, SSVF, and other VA housing resources. The program supports Kentuckians navigating reentry in throughout Kentucky.
resources.description_es: Línea nacional para veteranos sin hogar (877-4AID-VET) es una línea gratuita y confidencial 24/7 que conecta a veteranos—incluidos los que salen del encarcelamiento sin vivienda—con el programa de vivienda del VA más cercano, refugio de emergencia y gestión de casos. El programa apoya a kentuckianos en reinserción en en todo Kentucky.
resources.hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
resources.eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
resources.eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
resources.notes: Also chat at va.gov/homeless/nationalcallcenter.asp. Have DD-214 and SSN ready if available. Works with local VA Medical Center homeless teams.
resources.notes_es: También chat en va.gov/homeless. Tenga DD-214 y SSN listos si están disponibles.

resources.name: KVC Kentucky — Family Reunification Services
resources.description: KVC Kentucky is a nonprofit child welfare and behavioral health organization headquartered in Lexington, serving more than 22,000 children and families annually across eight Kentucky regions. Family First Preservation and Reunification Services help families stay together or reunify after out-of-home placement through in-home, evidence-based support coordinated with DCBS. Also provides behavioral health, substance abuse treatment, and foster care services. All preservation/reunification referrals come through the Department for Community Based Services (DCBS)—contact your DCBS worker to initiate. The program supports Kentuckians navigating reentry in throughout Kentucky.
resources.description_es: KVC Kentucky es una organización sin fines de lucro de bienestar infantil y salud conductual con sede en Lexington, que sirve a más de 22,000 niños y familias anualmente en ocho regiones. Servicios de Preservación y Reunificación Familiar ayudan a familias a permanecer juntas o reunificarse después de separación, coordinados con DCBS. También ofrece salud conductual, tratamiento de sustancias y cuidado de crianza. Referidos de preservación/reunificación vienen de DCBS. El programa apoya a kentuckianos en reinserción en en todo Kentucky.
resources.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; behavioral health intake by appointment
resources.eligibility: Varies by program—open to parents, caregivers, and families affected by incarceration.
resources.eligibility_es: Varía según el programa—abierto a padres, cuidadores y familias afectadas por encarcelamiento.
resources.notes: For current intake, call (859) 254-1035; visit https://kentucky.kvc.org/. Monday–Friday during business hours; behavioral health intake by appointment.
resources.notes_es: Para admisión actual, llame al (859) 254-1035; visite https://kentucky.kvc.org/. Monday–Friday during business hours; behavioral health intake by appointment.

resources.name: Veterans Crisis Line
resources.description: Veterans Crisis Line provides free, confidential crisis support for veterans and their families 24/7. Call or text 988 then press 1, or chat at veteranscrisisline.net. Trained responders—many veterans themselves—provide immediate support for suicidal crisis, PTSD episodes, and reentry stress. Also supports active duty, Guard, Reserve, and family members.
resources.description_es: Línea de Crisis para Veteranos ofrece apoyo gratuito y confidencial 24/7. Llame o envíe mensaje al 988 y presione 1, o chat en veteranscrisisline.net. Respondedores capacitados brindan apoyo inmediato en crisis suicida, TEPT y estrés de reinserción.
resources.hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
resources.eligibility: U.S. military veterans and eligible family members. Some programs serve veterans with justice involvement.
resources.eligibility_es: Veteranos militares de EE.UU. y familiares elegibles. Algunos programas atienden veteranos con participación en justicia penal.
resources.notes: Text 838255 to connect. If immediate danger, call 911. Spanish-language support available.
resources.notes_es: Envíe mensaje al 838255. No requiere inscripción en VA. Si hay peligro inmediato, llame al 911. Soporte en español disponible.

resources.name: Gateway Community & Technical College — Adult Education
resources.description: Gateway Community & Technical College Adult Education offers free GED preparation in Northern Kentucky for Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Grant, Owen, and surrounding counties. Kentucky waives GED testing fees for first-time test takers working through a KYAE center. Classes at Florence campus and community sites. Gateway also recognizes GED College Ready scores for college enrollment.
resources.description_es: Educación para Adultos de Gateway ofrece preparación GED gratuita en el norte de Kentucky para Boone, Kenton, Campbell, Grant, Owen y condados circundantes. Kentucky exonera tarifas GED para primeros solicitantes a través de un centro KYAE. Clases en Florence y sitios comunitarios.
resources.eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
resources.notes: GED fee waiver available when working with local Gateway/KYAE office.
resources.notes_es: Contacte al (859) 442-1695 para inscripción. Exención de tarifa GED disponible trabajando con la oficina Gateway/KYAE.

resources.name: Kentucky Adult Education — Find a Program
resources.description: Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) is the state office connecting residents to free adult education in all 120 counties—GED preparation, literacy, ESL, workforce certifications, and family literacy. Use the online locator to find your county's KCTCS-based adult education center. All GED seekers must pass the GED Ready practice test (free at KYAE centers) before qualifying for state-funded GED testing.
resources.description_es: Kentucky Adult Education (KYAE) conecta a residentes con educación para adultos gratuita en 120 condados—GED, alfabetización, ESL, certificaciones laborales y alfabetización familiar. Use el localizador en línea para encontrar su centro. Todos deben pasar GED Ready (gratis en centros KYAE) antes de calificar para pruebas financiadas.
resources.hours: Varies by county center—use locator for local contact
resources.eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
resources.notes: Promo codes: KYFREEGED1 (test center) or OPKYFREEGED (online proctored).
resources.notes_es: Códigos promocionales: KYFREEGED1 (centro) u OPKYFREEGED (en línea). Inscripción no requerida pero recomendada para apoyo académico.

resources.name: Ashland Community & Technical College — Adult Education
resources.description: Ashland Community & Technical College (ACTC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation and adult literacy for Boyd County and surrounding Northeast Kentucky counties. Part of the KCTCS/KYAE statewide network with classes in community and county jail settings. Kentucky waives first-time GED test fees for eligible students passing GED Ready at a KYAE center. The program supports Kentuckians navigating reentry in 10 Kentucky counties.
resources.description_es: Educación para Adultos de ACTC ofrece preparación GED gratuita y alfabetización para el Condado de Boyd y condados circundantes del noreste de Kentucky. Parte de la red KCTCS/KYAE con clases en cárceles del condado. El programa apoya a kentuckianos en reinserción en 10 condados de Kentucky.
resources.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; class schedules vary
resources.eligibility: Kentucky waives first-time GED test fees for eligible students passing GED Ready at a KYAE center.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
resources.notes: Call (606) 326-2000 for enrollment. Promo code KYFREEGED1 for state-funded testing. Also offers ESL and workforce certifications.
resources.notes_es: Llame al (606) 326-2000 para inscripción. Código promocional KYFREEGED1 para pruebas financiadas.

resources.name: Big Sandy Community & Technical College — Adult Education
resources.description: Big Sandy Community & Technical College — Adult Education serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in 7 Kentucky counties. Big Sandy Community & Technical College (BSCTC) Adult Education offers free GED classes for Floyd, Johnson, Lawrence, Magoffin, Martin, and Pike counties. Part of KCTCS/KYAE with instruction inside Big Sandy Regional Detention Center and Pike County Detention Center—critical for Eastern Kentucky reentry education. Coalition and navigator programs connect returning citizens to local partners—they rarely provide emergency shelter, cash aid, or 24/7 crisis response on their own. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
resources.description_es: Big Sandy Community & Technical College — Adult Education sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en 7 condados de Kentucky. Las coaliciones y programas de navegación conectan a ciudadanos que regresan con aliados locales—rara vez ofrecen refugio de emergencia, efectivo o respuesta de crisis 24/7 por sí solos. Contacte este recurso para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.
resources.eligibility: Kentucky residents age 18 or older. All adult education and GED services are free through KYAE.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
resources.notes: Prestonsburg campus: One Bert T. Combs Drive. Call (606) 886-3863 for enrollment.
resources.notes_es: Campus Prestonsburg: One Bert T. Combs Drive. Llame al (606) 886-3863. Tarifas GED exoneradas para primeros solicitantes.

resources.name: Somerset Community College — Adult Education
resources.description: Somerset Community College — Adult Education serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in 10 Kentucky counties. Somerset Community College (SCC) Adult Education provides free GED preparation and adult education for Pulaski County and the Lake Cumberland region. KCTCS/KYAE network member serving adults in community settings and county jails. State-funded first-time GED testing for eligible students. Coalition and navigator programs connect returning citizens to local partners—they rarely provide emergency shelter, cash aid, or 24/7 crisis response on their own. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
resources.description_es: Somerset Community College — Adult Education sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en 10 condados de Kentucky. Las coaliciones y programas de navegación conectan a ciudadanos que regresan con aliados locales—rara vez ofrecen refugio de emergencia, efectivo o respuesta de crisis 24/7 por sí solos. Contacte este recurso para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.
resources.eligibility: State-funded first-time GED testing for eligible students.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes de Kentucky de 18 años o más. Todos los servicios de educación para adultos y GED son gratuitos a través de KYAE.
resources.notes: For current intake, call (606) 679-8501; visit https://somerset.kctcs.edu/workforce-solutions/adult-education/index.aspx. Monday–Friday during business hours.

resources.name: kynect — KTAP & Financial Assistance
resources.description: kynect is Kentucky's online benefits portal for applying for KTAP (Kentucky Transitional Assistance Program) cash assistance, SNAP food benefits, Medicaid, Child Care Assistance Program (CCAP), and other programs. KTAP provides monthly cash aid to low-income families with dependent children, with a 60-month lifetime limit, plus work support through Kentucky Works. Apply online at kynect.ky.gov, by phone at 855-306-8959, or in person at any DCBS office in all 120 counties. Use the prescreening tool before applying to check potential eligibility.
resources.description_es: kynect es el portal en línea de beneficios de Kentucky para KTAP (asistencia en efectivo), SNAP, Medicaid, CCAP y otros programas. KTAP proporciona ayuda mensual a familias de bajos ingresos con hijos dependientes, con límite de 60 meses de por vida. Solicite en kynect.ky.gov, al 855-306-8959 o en cualquier oficina DCBS en 120 condados. Use la herramienta de preselección antes de solicitar.
resources.hours: Phone line Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. ET; online applications 24/7
resources.eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
resources.eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
resources.notes: DCBS Call Services: 855-306-8959 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–5 p.m. ET).
resources.notes_es: DCBS Call Services: 855-306-8959 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–5 p.m. ET). Requiere cuenta Kentucky Online Gateway (KOG). Beneficiarios KTAP pueden calificar para cuidado infantil y transporte.

resources.name: 211 Kentucky — Crisis Resource Navigation
resources.description: Kentucky 211 connects residents to local emergency financial assistance, food, housing, utilities, mental health services, and other community resources. Dial 2-1-1 from any phone or text your zip code to 898211 to reach a trained specialist 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Service provided through United Way of Kentucky's network covering all 120 counties. Free, confidential, and available in multiple languages with interpreter support. Also searchable online at kentucky211.org.
resources.description_es: Kentucky 211 conecta a residentes con asistencia financiera de emergencia, alimentos, vivienda, servicios públicos, salud mental y otros recursos comunitarios. Marque 2-1-1 o envíe su código postal al 898211 para hablar con un especialista las 24 horas. Servicio de la red United Way de Kentucky en 120 condados. Gratuito, confidencial y con intérpretes. También busque en línea en kentucky211.org.
resources.hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
resources.eligibility: Low-income individuals and families; income guidelines apply for most programs. Criminal history is generally not a barrier.
resources.eligibility_es: Personas y familias de bajos ingresos; aplican límites de ingresos en la mayoría de programas. El historial criminal generalmente no es barrera.
resources.notes: Text zip code to 898211 (no hyphen). 211 does not provide direct cash assistance—specialists refer to local programs. Pairs with kynect.ky.gov for benefits applications.
resources.notes_es: Envíe código postal al 898211. 211 no proporciona efectivo directo—refiere a programas locales. Complementa kynect.ky.gov para beneficios.

Contacte este recurso para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.
resources.eligibility: Elliott County residents meeting income and household-size requirements for Medicaid, SNAP, KTAP, and child care assistance; criminal record generally not a barrier.
resources.eligibility_es: Residentes del condado Elliott que cumplan requisitos de ingresos para Medicaid, SNAP, KTAP y cuidado infantil; los antecedentes penales generalmente no son barrera.
resources.notes: Apply online at kynect.ky.gov or visit this county DCBS office; bring ID, Social Security card, and release documents if applicable.
resources.notes_es: Solicite en kynect.ky.gov o visite esta oficina DCBS del condado; traiga identificación, tarjeta de Seguro Social y documentos de liberación si aplica.

resources.name: DCBS — Estill County Family Support
resources.description: DCBS — Estill County Family Support serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in Estill County. DCBS Family Support office in Irvine helps Estill County residents apply for Medicaid, SNAP, KTAP, and child care assistance through kynect. Returning citizens and families rebuilding after incarceration can establish health coverage and food benefits at this county office or online with local staff assisting document verification. Coalition and navigator programs connect returning citizens to local partners—they rarely provide emergency shelter, cash aid, or 24/7 crisis response on their own. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
